name: ai-coding-skills
description: A collection of Claude Code skills for software engineering workflows — database engineering, query optimization, schema auditing, and more.

skills.name: db-engineer
skills.description: Acts as a senior database engineer to audit and optimize the DB layer of any codebase. Covers schema indexing, N+1 detection, query anti-patterns, transactions, and config for SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB. Reports findings by severity and waits for approval before applying any fixes.
